use_cases: Primary action triggers in forms and interfaces
Navigation actions with different visual weight variants
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbar actions
ai_summary: A shadcn-inspired atomic Button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe styling. Uses standard ring-based focus states and disabled opacity, following minimalist flat design patterns suitable for SaaS dashboards and dev tools interfaces.
